name: A664InitMessage
title: A664InitMessage
syntax: long A664InitMessage (a664Message aMessage, dword srcIP, dword dstIP, word srcUDP, word dstUDP, word VLid, word payloadSize)
description: The complete Ethernet, IP- and UDP headers for an AFDX message are consistently set based on the given parameters. The payload area is initialized with 0.

parameters.name: aMessage
parameters.description: The message object to be initialized.

parameters.name: srcIP
parameters.description: Source IP address to be used for the Eth and IP headers.

parameters.name: dstIP
parameters.description: Destination IP address to be used for the IP headers.

parameters.name: srcUDP
parameters.description: Source UDP port for the UDP header.

parameters.name: dstUDP
parameters.description: Destination UDP port for the UDP header.

parameters.name: VLid
parameters.description: VLId to be used for the destination Eth header (see selector EthVlId).

parameters.name: payloadSize
parameters.description: Size of the message payload after UDP header without counting the sequence number.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
